name: exa-data-handling
description: Implement Exa PII handling, data retention, and GDPR/CCPA compliance patterns. Use when handling sensitive data, implementing data redaction, configuring retention policies, or ensuring compliance with privacy regulations for Exa integrations. Trigger with phrases like "exa data", "exa PII", "exa GDPR", "exa data retention", "exa privacy", "exa CCPA".
